title_en: 【府中牝馬Ｓ】ヴァルキリーバース 上昇の併入フィニッシュ 陣営納得の出来「状態も良くなってきた」

title_en: 【しらさぎＳ】ショウナンアデイブ ひと花咲かせる ７歳でも衰え知らず→距離短縮で新味発揮
description: 「しらさぎＳ・Ｇ３」（２１日、阪神） 昨年は大不振に陥ったショウナンアデイブが、完全に勢いを取り戻した。今季は京都金杯で１８番人気３着と激走すると、続く小倉大賞典が１０番人気３着、そして前走のマイラーズＣも１３番人気４着と人気を大きく上回る快走を続けている。７歳を迎えても、セール５億円超えのディープインパクト産駒はまだまだ健在。そろそろ待望の重賞初Ｖを決めたいところだ。 まだ終わったとは?..

title_en: 【府中牝馬Ｓ】ニシノティアモ 万全仕上がり 上原佑師「動きは良かった」「稍重までならこなせるかな」
description: 「府中牝馬Ｓ・Ｇ３」（２１日、東京） もう十分だろう。１週前に津村騎乗の３頭併せで負荷をかけたニシノティアモの最終追いは１８日、美浦Ｗを単走馬なり。騎乗者がガッチリと抑え込み、最後まで余力を残したまま６Ｆ８６秒７-３８秒７-１２秒２をマークした。上原佑師は「動きは良かったです。在厩で調整して、前走の状態を維持している。１週前に整っているので、きょうは馬場を考慮してサラッとやりました」と納得の?..

title_en: 【新馬戦】ルークウォーム 重賞馬に先着！いきなり好勝負の予感 手塚久師「新馬向きです」
description: 「新馬戦」（２０日、東京） 土曜東京４Ｒ（芝１４００メートル）でデビュー戦を迎えるルークウォーム（牝２歳、父トゥーダーンホット、美浦・手塚久）。英国馬である父はＧ１・３勝を挙げ、欧州の年度代表表彰であるカルティエ賞で最優秀２歳牡馬を獲得している。 ２週前の美浦Ｗで重賞馬ブラウンラチェットに先着するなど追い切りの動きは抜群。手塚久師は「言うことないですね。新馬向きです」と手放しに褒めた。鞍?..

title_en: 若武者・小沢が函館で示す存在感 いきなり３勝の開幕ダッシュ 「たくさん乗って、一つでもいい競馬を」
description: 滞在競馬の北海道シリーズでは、ジョッキーが追い切り以外の調教に乗るケースが多い。多くの騎手が連日、馬とコンタクトを取っているなか、精力的に調教をこなす若手がいる。デビュー６年目に突入した小沢大仁騎手（２３）＝栗東・フリー＝だ。今夏は北海道を主戦場として勝負する。 「馬に乗るのは好きなので、平日から他の人よりもたくさん乗るつもり。１鞍でも競馬につながればという気持ちです。北海道はレベルの高い?..

description: 「新馬戦」（２０日、阪神） 土曜阪神５Ｒ（芝１４００メートル）にスタンバイするサンタンジェロ（牝２歳、父エピファネイア、栗東・須貝）は、祖母がＧ１・７勝馬ジェンティルドンナで、叔母が２２年エリザベス女王杯覇者ジェラルディーナという超良血。 黒田助手は「かなり順調です。体も精神面でも特に言うことがない」とポテンシャルの高さを評価。ここまで併せ馬を入念に消化しており、「坂路で行きたがるところ?..

description: 【競馬人生劇場・平松さとし】先週14日に行われた宝塚記念(G1)を制したのは、メイショウタバル(栗東・石橋守厩舎)だった。鞍上はご存じ、レジェンド・武豊騎手である。 「できれば馬場が渋ってほしい」 そんな武豊騎手の願いに応えるかのように、レース直前に降り始めた雨は一気に土砂降りとなり、馬場を濡らした。もちろん、それだけが勝因ではないだろう。しかし結果を見れば、この雨がマイナスに働かなかったことは?..

description: 6歳にして素質開花を迎えた。スイープアワーズは前走・立雲峡Sで約1年2カ月ぶりのV。父ディープインパクト、母スイープトウショウから受け継いだ切れ味を発揮した。上がり3F32秒9はメンバー2位を0秒7も上回り、重賞級と思えるインパクト。今年2月に宮地厩舎に転厩して3戦目だった。指揮官は「メンタル面と体のバランスに重点を置いて調整してきました。転厩当初に比べて、コントロールが利いてマッチしてきた感じはあります」...

description: シンフォーエバーは唯一の木曜追いを行い、坂路単走で4F55秒3〜1F12秒5。馬なりのまま軽快に駆け上がった。 清水助手は「全体時計は出さなかったけど行きっぷりも良く、いい状態を維持」と満足げ。2走前から在厩で進めており、「使っていることで、いい意味でガス抜きができている。前走(安土城S14着)はスタートから2歩目ぐらいでトモを落としたけど、そこまで内容は悪くなかった。改めて自分の形で」と意気込んだ。

title_en: 【阪神新馬戦】クールタロウ 好仕上がり 富田「距離も合うと思う」
description: 土曜阪神5R(芝1400メートル)はクールタロウ(牡＝宮地、父デクラレーションオブウォー)が好仕上がり。 17日の最終追いは坂路併せ馬でラスト1F12秒3を馬なりでマークし、年長馬に首先着。稽古をつけている富田は「仕上がりはいいですよ。動きの質が良くて素質を感じます」と評価。母クールティアラは1000〜1150メートルの距離で3勝。「短距離っぽい走りをしていて、距離も合うと思う」と適性を見込んだ。

description: 日曜東京5R(芝1800メートル)は好素材がそろった。手塚久師が送り出すラガリーガ(牡、父キズナ)は、母に米仏で重賞2勝を挙げたラサルダンを持つ良血だ。 17日のWコース最終追いでは、馬なりで5F68秒0〜1F11秒2をマーク。指揮官は「時計的には(先週と)同じくらいだけど、先週よりもいい。動き的には新馬を勝てるレベルにある」と納得の表情を浮かべた。鞍上に名手ルメールを配し、必勝態勢で臨む。

description: 土曜函館5R(芝1200メートル、牝馬限定)にはラピッドテソーロ(畠山、父キタサンブラック)がスタンバイ。母は16年全日本2歳優駿を制したリエノテソーロという良血だ。 最終追いはWコースで迫力のある脚さばき。5F68秒7〜1F12秒8をマークした。木場迫助手は「こちらの雰囲気にも慣れて、落ち着いていて順調です。緩いのでまだこれからの馬ですが、美浦で1本追ってから連れてきた。フットワークはいいですし、これから良くなる...

description: 土曜函館6R(ダート1000メートル)は祖母にスプリント重賞5勝シーイズトウショウがいるアースグリッパー(牝＝秋山、父ヘニーヒューズ)に注目が集まる。デビュー戦へ向け17日にWコースで最終追い。しっかり負荷をかけられ、5F69秒4〜1F12秒3を計時した。 永岩助手は「余裕はある感じですが落ち着いていて、順調に調教できている。ポテンシャルはありますよ」と愛馬を評する。鞍上は安田記念→宝塚記念とG1連勝中の武豊。「一?..

title_en: Venetian Sun, Outfielder Enter Commonwealth Cup
description: Outfielder is the sole American entrant in the Commonwealth Cup Stakes (G1) June 19 at Royal Ascot.

title_en: Coolmore Celebrates 'Iconic' Day at Ascot for Justify
description: Despite being a Triple Crown winner on dirt, Justify strengthened his résumé as a top stallion for European turf races June 18 at Royal Ascot with offspring taking the 2 1/2-mile Gold Cup Stakes (G1) and finishing 1-2 in the 7-furlong Chesham Stakes.

title_en: NYRA Names Stakes as Part of Empire Trillium Series
description: The New York Racing Association announces the names for the New York legs of the Empire Trillium Series, a 14-race program of stakes races at Belmont Park and Woodbine restricted to horses foaled in New York or Canada.

title_en: Alvarado Fined, Suspended Over Belmont Riding-Crop Use
description: New York stewards fine jockey Junior Alvarado $3,000 and suspend him for three racing days for exceeding the permitted number of strikes from his riding crop in guiding Chief Wallabee to a fourth-place finish in the June 6 Belmont Stakes (G1).

title_en: Reserve Bank Secures Stud Future Via Inglis Bull Ring
description: Group 1-winning sprinter Reserve Bank will continue his career as a stallion after being secured by Botty's Bloodstock though the inaugural Inglis Bull Ring sale, a new private auction platform powered by Inglis Digital.

title_en: Precise, True Love Clash Again in Coronation
description: Aidan O'Brien-trained stablemates Precise and True Love meet for the third time this season in the Coronation Stakes (G1) at Royal Ascot. Each filly owns a win over the other this season, with the Coronation a potential final rubber match.

title_en: Kentucky-Bred Scandinavia Edges Trawlerman in Gold Cup
description: Kentucky-bred Scandinavia provided trainer Aidan O'Brien with his 100th winner at Royal Ascot by edging out defending winner Trawlerman in the final strides of a scintillating Gold Cup Stakes (G1) June 18 at Ascot Racecourse.

title_en: HISA Announces Veterinary Advisory Committee Additions
description: The Horseracing Integrity and Safety Authority announces the additions of Drs. Kevin Dunlavy, Vickie Heidlage-Williams, Jamie McAnly, Clayton McCook, and Gabrielle Rivest to its Veterinary Advisory Committee.

title_en: Saratoga Opening Weekend to Celebrate America 250
description: The New York Racing Association announces a full slate of events for the July 4th Racing Festival, which will be held July 3 through July 5, and serve as opening weekend of the summer meet at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Bernick's Nola Soul Lands Royal Ascot's Chesham Stakes
description: Owner Craig Bernick, president of Glen Hill Farm, secured a stakes victory at Royal Ascot June 18 when Nola Soul, a son of Justify, finished well to post a victory over another son of Justify in the Chesham Stakes for 2-year-olds.

title_en: Concrete Glory Named Claiming Crown Horse of the Year
description: Big Frank Stable's Concrete Glory has been selected as the 2025 Claiming Crown Horse of the Year after the Pennsylvania-bred gelding won the $102,000 Claiming Crown Ready's Rocket Express for the second straight year at Churchill Downs.

title_en: Justify Filly Brings Record $1.4 Million at OBS June
description: At the end of the second session, 173 horses had changed hands for a total of $9,285,000, including private sales. The average price for Day 2 was $53,671, with a median of $27,000.

title_en: Hawthorne Officials Optimistic About Bankruptcy Outcome
description: Hawthorne Race Course has asked for more time to sort through bids to buy the track out of bankruptcy, citing the number of suitors and the level of investment and due diligence required.

title_en: Lady Jancis Breaks Her Maiden in Front-Running Fashion
description: Lady Jancis breaks her maiden in a dominant, front-running score June 10 at Churchill Downs.

title_en: Known Agenda Sold to New Farm in Uruguay
description: The grade 1-winning son of Curlin has been purchased by Haras La Peregrina in Maldonado.

title_en: Yves Turcotte Wins 2026 Avelino Gomez Memorial Award
description: Yves Turcotte has been named the 2026 recipient of the Avelino Gomez Memorial Award., an honor given to a Canadian-born, Canadian-raised, or a regular Canadian rider who has made significant contributions to Thoroughbred racing.

title_en: NYRA Setting Bonuses, Purse Increases to Boost Belmont
description: Sept. 18 looms as the important moment in NYRA's 71-year history.

title_en: Saratoga Casino, NYRA Announce Barn Fire Relief Efforts
description: In response to the devastating barn fire the morning of June 16, Saratoga Casino Hotel announces a coordinated response that includes a $100,000 donation, upcoming fundraising efforts, and a memorial service to honor the horses lost in the tragedy.

title_en: Fresu, D'Amato, Reddam Lead Hollywood Meet Standings
description: For the second year in a row, Antonio Fresu finished as the leading jockey at the Santa Anita Hollywood Meet. Phil D'Amato bagged yet another Santa Anita trainers' title and Reddam Racing finished as leading owner.

title_en: Scandinavia Seeks More Top-Notch Success in Gold Cup
description: Last year's St. Leger Stakes (G1) winner Scandinavia will face 10 rivals when he bids to land another group 1 success in the Gold Cup Stakes (G1) June 18 during the Royal Ascot meeting at Ascot Racecourse.

title_en: O'Brien Denies Team Tactics From His Ascot Riders
description: Aidan O'Brien dismisses the suggestion that team tactics were employed in the June 16 St. James's Palace Stakes (G1) after Christophe Soumillon was handed an eight-day ban by the stewards.

title_en: Ombudsman Sparkles in Royal Ascot Showdown
description: Ombudsman once again showed his scintillating turn of foot to win the June 17 Prince of Wales's Stakes (G1) at Ascot Racecourse for a second year running with Minnie Hauk second and Daryz third.

title_en: Keeneland Unveils Fall Meet Stakes Schedule
description: Before Keeneland hosts the Breeders' Cup World Championships for the fourth time, the track will celebrate its 90th birthday with a 17-day fall meet from Oct. 2-24 featuring 22 stakes worth $10.7 million.

title_en: Keeneland is Co-Sponsor of Horse Racing Women's Group
description: Keeneland is the co-title sponsor for the Horse Racing Women's Association along with FanDuel TV for the remainder of 2026.

title_en: Eclatant, Usha to Battle Under Lights in Chicago Stakes
description: The $300,000 Chicago Stakes (G3) on June 20 at Churchill Downs features a grade 1 throwdown under the lights.

title_en: Lopez Named Jockey of the Week After Riding 20 Winners
description: While it's not unusual for Paco Lopez to post double-digit wins for the week, 20 wins was extraordinary. He was named Jockeys' Guild Jockey of the Week for June 8-14.

title_en: HIWU Suspends Veteran Trainer Bennett for One Week
description: Because of findings of the presence of a controlled medication substance or its metabolites, HIWU has disqualified a pair of runners who earned placings at Tampa Bay Downs in late March for veteran trainer Gerald Bennett.

title_en: Preakness Alumni Face Desert Gate, Albus in Ohio Derby
description: Preakness Stakes (G1) alumni Chip Honcho, Ocelli, Bull by the Horns, and Robusta reappear in the $500,000 Ohio Derby (G3) June 20 at Thistledown.

title_en: Unbeaten Bow Echo Edges Gstaad in St. James's Palace
description: English Two Thousand Guineas (G1) winner Bow Echo clung on to victory in the St. James's Palace Stakes (G1) June 16 at Royal Ascot, holding off Irish Two Thousand Guineas (G1) winner Gstaad to maintain his unbeaten record.

title_en: Mission Central Rallies to Win King Charles III Stakes
description: Mission Central stormed to victory in the King Charles III Stakes (G1) June 16 at the Royal Ascot meeting where trainer Aidan O'Brien and jockey Ryan Moore added to their legacy at the meeting.

title_en: Santa Anita Park Concludes Winter/Spring Meet
description: Santa Anita Park concluded its six-month winter/spring season June 15. All-sources handle totaled $708,112,231, the sixth consecutive year daily handle has exceeded $9 million, but 5% off last year's reported total of $745,947,859.

title_en: Three Chimneys Back for Another Queen Mary With Ruiva
description: Trained by Wesley Ward, Ruiva is set to run in the Queen Mary Stakes (G2) June 17 during the Royal Ascot meet at Ascot Racecourse.

title_en: Horses Die in Saratoga Harness Track Barn Fire
description: An early-morning fire June 16 at a backstretch barn on the grounds of Saratoga Casino Hotel, a harness track in Saratoga Springs, N.Y., resulted in the deaths of 17 horses June 16 and forced the day's cancellation of racing

title_en: International Pedigrees Up Front in American Stakes
description: In this week's Porter on Pedigrees, we take a look at the international bloodlines of Dona Clota and Gimme a Nother, who each scored in grade 3s run June 13 in North America.

title_en: Debut runner Book Value Is Mandaloun's First Winner
description: Book Value, bred and trainer by Robert Gorham and owned by Marion Gorham, wins his racing debut June 16 at Thistledown by 3 3/4 lengths.

title_en: Known Agenda Sires First Stakes Winner With Squad Goals
description: Squad Goals wins the Tom Ridge Stakes by 1 1/2 lengths June 15 at Presque Isle Downs.

title_en: Triple Crown Shows Top Stallion Honors Far From Settled
description: This week's edition of The List looks at the race for top stallion honors after the Triple Crown.

title_en: Mendelssohn Gets His 50th Black-Type Stakes Winner
description: Hark Theangelssing, a 3-year-old daughter of Mendelssohn, became her sire's 50th black-type stakes winner June 14, conquering the Stormy Blues Stakes at Laurel Park.

title_en: Mitts Is First Winner for Gretzky the Great
description: Mitts, in his second career start, is placed first by disqualification giving his sire Gretzky the Great his initial winner in a 2-year-old maiden special weight race June 13 at Gulfstream Park.

title_en: Harper's Corner Is First Winner for Speaker's Corner
description: The filly wins her racing debut June 12 in a 5-furlong maiden special weight at Laurel Park. Harper's Corner is owned by Charles Biggs and trained by Cathal Lynch.

title_en: Techwerkian Sails to Become Olympiad's First Winner
description: Techwerkian wins a 4 1/2-furlong, main-track maiden special weight gate to wire by 1 1/4 lengths June 12 at Belterra Park.

title_en: Sharp-Eyed Horseman John Greathouse Jr. Dies at 82
description: John Greathouse Jr. helped his family-owned and -operated Glencrest Farm see success at the highest level.

title_en: White Abarrio to Enter Stud in 2027 at Gainesway
description: White Abarrio, winner of the 2023 Breeders' Cup Classic (G1) and earner of more than $8.4 million, will enter stud at Gainesway in 2027, according to a social media post June 11 by co-owner C2 Racing Stable.

title_en: Harrell Family Announces Opening of Reverie Farm
description: Curtis and Beth Harrell have reopened a historic 370-acre farm, formerly the site of Bonne Chance Farm, as a boutique boarding operation for broodmares under the management of John Durr.

title_en: Stallion Mind Your Biscuits Dies in Japan at 13
description: The son of Posse died suddenly June 9 at Shadai Stallion Station in Hokkaido, Japan, according to several international news outlets.

title_en: Sahadi, Owner of Cardiff Stud Farm, Dies at 91
description: A major owner and breeder in California, Fred Sahadi built Cardiff Stud Farm, co-founded Barretts Equine Sales, and was the father of trainer Jenine Sahadi.

title_en: Englishman Surges to Head of Maxfield's First Crop
description: In this week's Porter on Pedigrees, Englishman emerged as the star of Maxfield's first crop with an impressive performance in the June 6 Woody Stephens Stakes (G1) at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Coolmore Partners Officially Announce Purchase of Nysos
description: Coolmore partners Susan Magnier, Michael Tabor, and Derrick Smith, announced June 8 they have purchased multiple grade 1 winner Nysos and will race him in partnership with the Baoma Corp. through the 2026 racing season.

title_en: Structor Sires First Winner in Japan
description: American grade 1 winner and freshman stallion Structor, who stands at Lex Stud on Hokkaido in Japan, sired his first winner June 3, when his daughter Yakumo Venus won her racing debut at Sonoda Racecourse.

title_en: Coolmore and Newgate Combine to Stand Wodeton in 2026
description: Powerhouse operations Coolmore and Newgate Farm have teamed up to stand classy operator Wodeton for the 2026 breeding season.

title_en: Stone Farm's 50 Years of Breeding Excellence Continues
description: Stone Farm's legendary half-century history of producing top racehorses—steeped in the Hancock family's renowned Kentucky breeding heritage—continues with Growth Equity.

title_en: Tapit Has Opportunity to Build on Belmont Legacy
description: Gainesway's marquee sire Tapit is tied with Lexington as the leading sire of Belmont Stakes winners with four. Lexington's Belmont winners won the race between 1868 and 1878.

title_en: Stakes Winner Tap Into This to Stand at Valor Farm
description: Tap Into This, a son of leading sire Tapit, never finished out of the money in 10 career starts and had his racing career ended abruptly by a suspensory injury. He hails from the immediate family of Eclipse champion grass mare Islington.

title_en: Maryland Matches Churchill Offer, Will Own Preakness Brand
description: Maryland Governor Wes Moore has announced that the state of Maryland has matched the $85-million bid from Churchill Downs for the intellectual property and branding rights to the Preakness, which will now be held by the state. The story was first reported by the Baltimore Banner. Gov. title_en: Pletcher To Begin Serving Suspension, Repole Reacts and Legal Team Vows to Fight On
description: According to the rulings page of the New York State Gaming Commission, trainer Todd Pletcher began serving a 10-day suspension Thursday.
